schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,000-10,000 scholarship for children of farmers
schemes.eligibility: Children of Karnataka farmers enrolled in Class 10 to degree

schemes.benefit_en: Education loan up to Rs 4 lakh at 4% interest (1% for girls/disabled)
schemes.eligibility: Bihar students who passed Class 12, admitted to recognized institutions

schemes.benefit_en: Full tuition fee + maintenance for SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/BC/EBC/अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों की पूरी फीस + रखरखाव
schemes.eligibility: Telangana SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students in recognized colleges

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 15,000/year for mothers to keep children in school
schemes.benefit_hi: बच्चों को स्कूल भेजने पर माँ को ₹15,000/वर्ष
schemes.eligibility: AP mothers with children enrolled in Classes 1-12 (BPL)

schemes.benefit_en: Free coaching for competitive exams (UPSC, SSC, Banking) for Jharkhand youth
schemes.benefit_hi: UPSC, SSC, बैंकिंग परीक्षाओं की मुफ्त कोचिंग
schemes.eligibility: Jharkhand youth aged 18-35 from poor families
